media.title: Media
media.drag_and_drop: Drag 'n' drop files here, or click to select files
media.extension_change_desc: The file extension will change from {original} to {new}. The original file will be replaced with the new format. Do you want to continue?

conflict.title: File Naming Conflict
conflict.multiple_files: There are {count} files that already exist. ({count} remaining)
conflict.single_file: A file named "{name}" already exists. What would you like to do?

media.preview_desc: Confirm if you want to upload this media.
media.error_renaming: There was an error renaming the file. Please try again.
media.move_item_desc: Choose where to move the selected item within the images folder
media.move_successful: The item has been moved to {path}
media.error_moving: There was an error moving the item. Please try again.
media.browse_media_desc: Browse your media library or upload a new image.
